case_title: FEITEL, HOWARD JR. VS MOULIA, PIERRE et al

docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MACMILLAN, SEAN-PATRICK

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FEITEL, HOWARD JR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOULIA, PIERRE MACMILLAN, SEAN-PATRICK $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $300.00, DEFENDANT MOULIA, PIERRE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MOULIA, PIERRE MACMILLAN, SEAN-PATRICK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT FEITEL, HOWARD JR. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
